MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-28-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT EXTRA SPACE STORAGE, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN COMPLIANCE WITH BUSINESS AND PROFESSION CODE SECTION 21703 ON WHICH IT RELIES TO SATISFY THE REQUIREMENT OF REASONABLE NOTICE, BECAUSE IT DOES NOT SHOW THAT ITS NOTICES STATED THE DATE ON WHICH THE SUMS OWED BECAME DUE. GIVEN THAT, AND GIVEN PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE DISPUTING DEFENDANT'S EFFORTS TO GIVE ORAL NOTICE, THERE REMAINS AN ISSUE WHETHER NOTICE WAS REASONABLE. MR. KREMEN IS TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT EXTRA SPACE STORAGE, L L C'S Motion For Summary Judgment IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN COMPLIANCE WITH BUSINESS AND PROFESSION CODE SECTION 21703 ON WHICH IT RELIES TO SATISFY THE REQUIREMENT OF REASONABLE NOTICE, BECAUSE IT DOES NOT SHOW THAT ITS NOTICES STATED THE DATE ON WHICH THE SUMS OWED BECAME DUE. GIVEN THAT, AND GIVEN PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE DISPUTING DEFENDANT'S EFFORTS TO GIVE ORAL NOTICE, THERE REMAINS AN ISSUE WHETHER NOTICE WAS REASONABLE. MR. KREMEN TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(g). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 = (301/PJB)
